title: Death Coordinate
description: Displays death coordinates on the death screen and in chat.
body:
## 📜 Short description

  **A client-side mod that displays your death coordinates on the death screen and sends them to chat. Messages and text position are configurable.**

## 📝 Contact details

 - **My discord: Donne431#6562 / donne431**

 - **Discord server:
   https://discord.gg/NQBhQRDEhF**

- **My website - https://donne431.github.io**

- **Donate ☕ - https://www.donationalerts.com/r/donne431**
   
## ‼️ Warning
1. **Please, if you have published this mod on another site, provide a link to *CurseForge* or *Modrinth*, thanks in advance.**
